creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-06 20:13:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/puppet      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Puppet lets you centrally manage every important aspect of your system using
  a cross-platform specification language that manages all the separate
  elements normally aggregated in different files, like users, cron jobs, and
  hosts, along with obviously discrete elements like packages, services, and
  files.
  
  WWW:    http://www.reductivelabs.com/projects/puppet/
  
  PR:             ports/109795
  Submitted by:   Tomoyuki Sakurai <cherry at trombik.mine.nu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.897     +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/sysutils/puppet/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/puppet/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/sysutils/puppet/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +319 -0    ports/sysutils/puppet/pkg-plist (new)
